zh: 赞美群星... 你终于醒了！
en: By the Stars... you're finally awake!

zh: 听我说！主电源丢失，飞船正在坠毁！
en: Listen to me! We've lost main power. The ship is going down!

zh: 魔力引擎过载... 一切都在崩溃。
en: The Mana Drive is critical... everything is falling apart.

zh: 拿着这根法杖，这是我们唯一的机会。
en: Take this wand. It's our only chance.

zh: 你必须在进入大气层前重写核心逻辑！
en: You need to reprogram the core logic before we hit atmosphere.

zh: 打开法术编辑器 (按 K)
成功！关闭编辑器(K)测试法术
en: Success! Close Editor (K) to test your spell
Logic confirmed. Destroy the Debris target!

zh: 逻辑不完整！重新打开编辑器(K)连接节点
en: Logic incomplete! Re-open Editor (K) to connect nodes
